name: Chicken Tortilla Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, cook onions and garlic in 2 tablespoons oil until onion is tender.
2. Stir in broth, bell pepper, ground red chiles, basil, salt, and pepper, and tomato puree. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a skillet until hot. Cook tortilla strips until light golden brown, about 30-60 seconds. Drain.
5. Divide tortilla strips and cooked chicken among 6 bowls. Pour broth over the chicken.
6. Top with cheese and avocado slices.
